questions.text: Which of the following describes a key bottleneck related to Mail & Files?
options: Inefficient scaling of SMTP protocol relays, POP3 vs IMAP states, and FTP control/data streams.
questions.correct_answer: Inefficient scaling of SMTP protocol relays, POP3 vs IMAP states, and FTP control/data streams.
questions.explanation: The topic covers how SMTP protocol relays, POP3 vs IMAP states, and FTP control/data streams scales under concurrent workloads, which represents the primary bottlenecks.
